The '''''Impounder''''' was an [[Imperial Customs Corvette]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mandus Fouc]]. It was part of the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] that attempted to take control of the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]] in the years following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
